committed_run.label: run-1-local-device
committed_run.note: Byte-committed here; re-verifies raw 0 under the repo verifier; verifier key distinct from ours (we do not possess it).

corroborating_run.label: run-2-remote-droplet
corroborating_run.note: Executed on a separate remote machine under Node 26 with a DIFFERENT distinct verifier key; documented in RAW_RESULTS.md. Its bytes were not transferred, so run 1 is the byte-committed artifact.

independence_note: distinct_key_only ONLY. The party ran the basic ceremony (de-identified: own keys, no name/email/account). They did NOT do the optional OpenTimestamps public-witness step, so there is no public_witness signal. The identity-anchored externally_anchored rung is intentionally NOT pursued — the party requires anonymity, and that rung requires revealing a real identity via Sigstore/OIDC.
non_claim: NOT rsp_unredacted_report_compliance; over the Opus 4.6 PUBLIC structure only; ratings are the droplet party's own independent assessments (NOT attributed to METR, Anthropic, or any named reviewer); does not observe the confidential report or Anthropic's real review panel; affiliation axis modeled; independence rung is distinct_key_only (NOT externally_anchored).
